title: 线上课程
description_uz: «Onlayn dars yuzma-yuz darsdan nimasi bilan farq qiladi?» — Ikki do'st onlayn ingliz tili kursi, e'tibor va to'lov haqida suhbatlashadi. Bu dialog taqqoslash, muammoni muhokama qilish va maslahat berishni mashq qiladi — diqqatni jamlash, narx-sifat va sinov darsi. O'qish va ish mavzusidagi foydali so'zlarga boy. Tinglash va rol o'ynash orqali ravonlikni mustahkamlash uchun zo'r.
description_ru: «Чем онлайн-занятия отличаются от очных?» — Двое друзей обсуждают онлайн-курс английского, внимание и оплату. Диалог тренирует сравнение, обсуждение проблемы и советы — как сосредоточиться, соотношение цена/качество и пробное занятие. Богат полезной лексикой об учёбе и работе. Отлично подходит для аудирования и ролевой игры, чтобы укрепить беглость.
description_en: «How are online classes different from in-person ones?» — Two friends discuss an online English course, focus, and tuition. The dialogue practices comparing, talking through a problem, and giving advice—staying focused, value for money, and a trial lesson. Rich in useful study-and-work vocabulary. Great for listening and role-play to build fluency.

sentences.text_translation_en: What have you been studying lately?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我报了一个线上英语课，每周上三次课。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bào le yí ge xiànshàng Yīngyǔ kè, měi zhōu shàng sān cì kè.
sentences.text_translation: Bitta onlayn ingliz tili kursiga yozildim, haftasiga uch marta dars bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я записался на онлайн-курс английского, занятия три раза в неделю.
sentences.text_translation_en: I signed up for an online English course — three classes a week.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 线上课跟线下课有什么不一样？
sentences.pinyin: Xiànshàng kè gēn xiànxià kè yǒu shénme bù yíyàng?
sentences.text_translation: Onlayn dars yuzma-yuz darsdan nimasi bilan farq qiladi?
sentences.text_translation_en: How are online classes different from in-person ones?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 线上课不用出门，在家就能上，很方便。
sentences.pinyin: Xiànshàng kè búyòng chūmén, zài jiā jiù néng shàng, hěn fāngbiàn.
sentences.text_translation: Onlayn darsda uydan chiqish shart emas, uyda turib qatnashsa bo'ladi, juda qulay.
sentences.text_translation_ru: На онлайн-занятие не нужно выходить из дома — можно учиться прямо дома, очень удобно.
sentences.text_translation_en: For online classes you don't have to go out — you can attend from home, very convenient.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: So how does the teacher teach?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 老师通过视频上课，可以跟学生聊天、回答问题。
sentences.pinyin: Lǎoshī tōngguò shìpín shàngkè, kěyǐ gēn xuéshēng liáotiān, huídá wèntí.
sentences.text_translation: O'qituvchi video orqali dars o'tadi, o'quvchilar bilan gaplashishi va savollarga javob berishi mumkin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Учитель ведёт урок через видео, может общаться с учениками и отвечать на вопросы.
sentences.text_translation_en: The teacher teaches via video and can chat with students and answer questions.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我觉得还可以。只要认真听，跟线下差不多。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ juéde hái kěyǐ. Zhǐyào rènzhēn tīng, gēn xiànxià chàbuduō.
sentences.text_translation: Menimcha yomon emas. Diqqat bilan tinglasang, yuzma-yuz darsdan deyarli farqi yo'q.
sentences.text_translation_ru: По-моему, вполне. Если слушать внимательно, почти как очно.
sentences.text_translation_en: I think it's pretty good. As long as you listen carefully, it's about the same as in-person.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你上课的时候会不会分心？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shàngkè de shíhou huì bú huì fēnxīn?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты не отвлекаешься во время занятий?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you get distracted during class?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 有时候会。尤其是手机在旁边的时候。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu shíhou huì. Yóuqí shì shǒujī zài pángbiān de shíhou.
sentences.text_translation: Ba'zan bo'linadi. Ayniqsa telefon yonimda bo'lganda.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Иногда да. Особенно когда телефон рядом.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sometimes. Especially when my phone is next to me.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你怎么解决这个问题？
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ zěnme jiějué zhè ge wèntí?
sentences.text_translation: Unda bu muammoni qanday hal qilasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А как ты решаешь эту проблему?
sentences.text_translation_en: So how do you solve that problem?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 上课的时候把手机放远一点，专心听讲。
sentences.pinyin: Shàngkè de shíhou bǎ shǒujī fàng yuǎn yì diǎn, zhuānxīn tīngjiǎng.
sentences.text_translation: Dars paytida telefonni uzoqroqqa qo'yib, diqqat bilan darsni tinglayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Во время занятия кладу телефон подальше и сосредоточенно слушаю.
sentences.text_translation_en: During class I put my phone a bit further away and listen attentively.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 有。老师会发练习给我们做，做完以后上传。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu. Lǎoshī huì fā liànxí gěi wǒmen zuò, zuò wán yǐhòu shàngchuán.
sentences.text_translation: Ha. O'qituvchi bizga mashqlar yuboradi, bajarib bo'lgach yuklab qo'yamiz.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Есть. Учитель присылает нам упражнения, а после выполнения мы их загружаем.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes. The teacher sends us exercises to do, and after finishing we upload them.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 不贵。比线下课便宜很多，一节课大概几十块。
sentences.pinyin: Bú guì. Bǐ xiànxià kè piányi hěn duō, yì jié kè dàgài jǐ shí kuài.
sentences.text_translation: Qimmat emas. Yuzma-yuz darsdan ancha arzon, bitta dars taxminan o'n-yigirma yuancha.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Недорого. Намного дешевле очных занятий, одно занятие — примерно несколько десятков юаней.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not expensive. Much cheaper than in-person classes — about a few dozen yuan per lesson.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 性价比挺高的。我考虑报一个中文课。
sentences.pinyin: Xìngjiàbǐ tǐng gāo de. Wǒ kǎolǜ bào yí ge Zhōngwén kè.
sentences.text_translation: Narx-sifat nisbati ancha yaxshi ekan. Men xitoy tili kursiga yozilishni o'ylab ko'ryapman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Соотношение цена/качество довольно хорошее. Я подумываю записаться на курс китайского.
sentences.text_translation_en: The value for money is pretty high. I'm thinking of signing up for a Chinese course.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 你可以先试听一节课，觉得合适再报名。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ xiān shìtīng yì jié kè, juéde héshì zài bàomíng.
sentences.text_translation: Avval bitta sinov darsini tinglab ko'rsang bo'ladi, mos kelsa keyin yozilasan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Можешь сначала посетить пробное занятие, а если подойдёт — записаться.
sentences.text_translation_en: You can first sit in on a trial lesson, and sign up if it feels right.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好主意！我也想试试线上学习的感觉。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo zhǔyi! Wǒ yě xiǎng shì shì xiànshàng xuéxí de gǎnjué.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi fikr! Men ham onlayn o'qish qanday bo'lishini his qilib ko'rmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошая идея! Я тоже хочу почувствовать, каково это — учиться онлайн.
sentences.text_translation_en: Good idea! I'd like to try out what online learning feels like too.
sentences.speaker: A
